/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -Wall -Wextra -O2 CMakeFiles/test_redis_pool.dir/tests/test_redis_pool.cpp.o -o test_redis_pool  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ly/workspaces/im/muduo-im/build/third_party/mymuduo-http libmymuduo.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
